title: Mk.2 Redstone
description: This resource pack makes redstone circuit easier to see.
body:
# Summary
Mk.2 Redstone is a vanilla-based resource pack for visual clarity of the Redstone circuit.

![Mk.2 Redstone Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x4eURsGc/images/c827afbc187120f9f6c7cd877e07511d2efc4b8c.png)

## Japanese showcase video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/X1CDI4Qi610" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Important
Some features, such as the charts displayed in the inventory, will only work if Minecraft is set to US English or Japanese.

# Special Thanks
We based on [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks) in creating this resource pack. Please check that out as well.
